name: the grouping yields zero rules and succeeds when enforcement produced no findings
command: printf '%s' '{"version":"2.1.0","runs":[{"tool":{"driver":{"name":"ruff"}},"results":[]}]}' > a.sarif && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/group-findings-by-rule.sh" --dir . 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'group-by-rule rules=0 findings=0' e.txt && echo empty-yields-zero-rules 1>&2
